title: Privacy Policy

meta.line1: Document describing the processing of TyPlace platform user data.
meta.line2: The current version is published on this page.

intro: This Privacy Policy describes what data the TyPlace platform may process, for what purposes this is done, how the data is used, and what rights the user has.

section1.title: 1. Who processes the data
section1.p1: The data controller for the operation of the TyPlace platform is the person operating the platform. Current contact methods are published on the

section2.title: 2. What data may be processed
section2.l2: username, user ID, avatar, and other profile data that the user specifies or uploads on the platform;
section2.l3: technical data, including IP address, device data, browser data, and the date and time of actions on the platform;
section2.l4: data related to listings, orders, reviews, support requests, disputes, and actions within the platform;
section2.l5: the content of messages in platform chats and attachments sent through chat or support;
section2.l6: data related to payment for a specific transaction, payment status, refund, order cancellation, dispute, and seller payout availability;
section2.l7: data related to notifications, including email notifications and, if connected, Telegram notifications;
section2.l8: other data that the user voluntarily provides to the platform or that is generated through the use of the service.

section3.title: 3. For what purposes the data is used
section3.l1: registration, login, and maintenance of the user account;
section3.l2: operation of listings, orders, the safe transaction mechanism, and other platform functions;
section3.l3: confirmation of payment for a specific transaction, handling refunds, cancellations, disputes, and seller payout availability;
section3.l4: processing support requests and reviewing disputes and appeals;
section3.l5: communication with the user regarding the account, orders, security, and platform operation;
section3.l6: detection of fraud, abuse, suspicious actions, and other risks;
section3.l7: security, logging of actions, and technical diagnostics;
section3.l8: improvement of the stability, functionality, and quality of the platform.

section4.title: 4. Legal grounds for data processing
section4.p1: The platform may process user data on the following grounds:
section4.l1: the need to perform the User Agreement and provide platform functions;
section4.l2: the legitimate interest of the platform in ensuring security, stability, and protection of the service from abuse;
section4.l3: the user’s consent, where required under applicable rules or the logic of the service;
section4.l4: the need to comply with mandatory requirements of applicable law.

section5.title: 5. Transfer of data to third parties
section5.p1: The platform may transfer data to third parties only to the extent necessary for the operation of the service and the achievement of the relevant purposes.
section5.l1: payment, infrastructure, and technical providers, including services involved in confirming payment for a specific transaction, refund processing, and payout availability processing;
section5.l2: hosting providers and providers of mail, security, analytics, and other technical services;
section5.l3: services related to security, anti-fraud, logging, and abuse prevention;
section5.l4: government authorities, rights holders, or other persons, if such transfer is required on mandatory legal grounds.

section6.title: 6. International nature of processing
section6.p1: The platform and the technical services it uses may involve data processing in different countries. The user understands that part of the technical infrastructure, providers, and communication channels may be located outside the user’s country.

section7.title: 7. Data retention period
section7.p1: Data may be retained for the duration of the user account, for the period necessary for the operation of platform functions, dispute review, request handling, abuse prevention, and for any other period reasonably necessary to fulfill the platform’s obligations and protect its legitimate interests.

section8.title: 8. Security and anti-fraud
section8.p1: The platform applies technical and organizational measures to protect data and may also use internal checks, restrictions, action logs, and automated and manual risk analysis mechanisms aimed at ensuring the security of the service, its users, and transactions.

section9.title: 9. User rights
section9.p1: Depending on applicable law, the user may have the right to:
section9.l1: receive information about the processing of their data;
section9.l2: request correction of inaccurate or outdated data;
section9.l3: request deletion of data, where such deletion is allowed and does not conflict with mandatory requirements or the legitimate interests of the platform;
section9.l4: restrict certain methods of processing in the cases provided for;
section9.l5: send a request regarding data processing through the available communication channels of the platform;
section9.p2: For issues related to data, you may contact:

section10.title: 10. Cookies and similar technologies
section10.p1: The platform may use cookies and similar technologies. More details are described in the

section11.title: 11. Changes to the policy
section11.p1: The platform may update this Privacy Policy. The current version is published on this page, and continued use of the platform after an update means acceptance of the new version to the extent applicable.
